prestazioni: Engine swap to 1UZ-FE V8 (4.0L, 32-valve, quad-cam) with a custom billet aluminum intake manifold by Tomei and a Garrett GT35R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) running 12 psi of boost, paired with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller and a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power with 50mm wastegate dump tubes

Full forged internals by JUN Auto including forged pistons (8.5:1 compression), H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft, mated to a T56 Magnum 6-speed manual transmission with a twin-disc clutch by OS Giken (2.5-inch diameter, 6 puck) and a Cusco Type RS 2-way limited-slip differential (4.875 final drive ratio)

Custom ECU tuning via Haltech Elite 2500 with individual cylinder fuel trims, dual Bosch 028 high-flow fuel pumps, and ID1000cc injectors, supplemented by a custom water-methanol injection system by Snow Performance (Stage 3 kit) with a 5-gallon reservoir and dual nozzles targeting the intake manifold
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (MasterAce Surf-specific) with custom carbon fiber overfenders, front bumper canards, and a rear diffuser, all finished in raw carbon fiber with a matte clear coat by 3M

Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (MasterAce Surf-specific valving) with 8kg/mm front springs and 7kg/mm rear springs, paired with Cusco front strut tower bars (22mm diameter) and a Cusco rear subframe brace (3-point, 25mm diameter)

Custom 18x9.5-inch ET0 Enkei RS05RR wheels (gold finish) wrapped in Toyo R888R tires (245/40/18 front, 265/35/18 rear), with a custom front lip spoiler by Veilside and a carbon fiber rear wing by APR Performance (GT-250 model, 60-inch width, adjustable angle)
